violations.text: The deli display case was observed not in operation and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

Inspector observed food for sale (tortillas, desserts) that originated from a home kitchen, per interview with owner. Food shall be obtained from sources that comply with Food Law, and food prepared in a private home may not be used or offered for human consumption in a food establishment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back and front retail area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2025
